name: Lathe Safety Simulator
developer: Arli Tuominen, Amelie Berthome, Joël Cancela Vaz, Kallan Dautriche, Malo Hilliard, Corentin Lheriaud, Bastien Ollivo, Arthur Pernot, Maxime Pointet, Fabien Quibreteau, Arttu Tuovinen, Augusto Gómez Eguíluz, Niall McShane, Michael Callaghan, Alan Bourhis
short_description: Play Lathe Safety Simulator and learn how to operate an industrial lathe. Follow the tutorials, identify all the major lathe parts and turn a work piece.
